Turn MOT data into booked jobs.

Garage Boost automatically scans your customer's MOT history, identifies upcoming expiries and advisories, and sends follow-ups that increase your revenue by up to 40%.

Everything You Need to Grow Your Garage

Powerful tools built specifically for UK MOT garages

Instant DVSA Lookup

One-click access to MOT history, mileage trends, and hidden advisories.

Automated Reminders

We send SMS & Emails 30, 14, and 7 days before an MOT expires.

Revenue Recovery

Identifies work flagged as advisories last year and prompts a booking.

Analytics Dashboard

Track revenue, conversion rates, and customer lifetime value in real-time.

Customer CRM

Manage all your customers, vehicles, and service history in one place.

Smart Quotes

Generate professional quotes instantly from MOT advisories.

Loved by UK Garages

Choose the perfect plan for your garage. All plans include 14 days free.
